_meta.source: xu4/src(靜態抽取 screenMessage/N/Center/TextAt 字面)
_meta.note: en = 硬編格式字串(含 %s/%d、\n);zh 待填。含 % 者於 H1 hook 需 format-aware 處理(post-vsnprintf 比對 / fragment 替換)。

strings.en: %cYou don't have enough reagents to mix %d spells!%c
strings.zh: %c汝的材料不足以調製 %d 道法術!%c

strings.en: A voice rings out:  What virtue exists independently of Truth, Love, and Courage?
strings.zh: 一個聲音迴響:有何美德能獨立於真理、愛與勇氣之外?

strings.en: As thou doth approach, a voice rings out: What virtue dost stem from %s?
strings.zh: 汝趨近時,一道聲音響起:何種美德源自%s?

strings.en:
The Voice says: Use thy Stone.

Color:
strings.zh:
那聲音道:使用汝之寶石。

顏色:

strings.en: The altar changes before thyne eyes!
Then what is the one thing which encompasses and is the whole of all undeniable Truth, unending Love, and unyielding Courage?
strings.zh: 那麼,何為那唯一囊括並統合一切不容否認之真理、無盡之愛與不屈之勇氣者?

strings.en:
There are holes for 4 stones.
What colors:
A:
strings.zh:
此處有四枚寶石之孔。
何種顏色:
A:

strings.en: You cast the Skull of Mondain into the Abyss!
strings.zh: 汝將蒙丹之顱擲入深淵!

strings.en: You hold the evil Skull of Mondain the Wizard aloft...
strings.zh: 汝高舉巫師蒙丹的邪惡頭骨…

strings.en: %cYou cannot mix any more of that spell!%c
%cYou cannot mix that much more of that spell!%c

Above the din, the voice asks:

If all eight virtues of the Avatar combine into and are derived from the Three Principles of Truth, Love and Courage...
strings.zh:
喧囂之上,那聲音問道:

若聖者之八德皆融匯並源自真理、仁愛與勇氣三大原則…

strings.en:
Alt-Q: Main Menu
Alt-V: Version
Alt-X: Quit
strings.zh:
Alt-Q:主選單
Alt-V:版本
Alt-X:離開

strings.en: As you light the Candle the Earth Trembles!
strings.zh: 當汝點燃蠟燭,大地震動!

strings.en: In the middle of the night while out on a stroll...
Once mounted, the Wheel glows with a blue light!

Oops, you just got too close to beating the game.
BAD AVATAR!
strings.zh:
糟糕,汝太接近通關了。
壞聖者!

strings.en: The Bell rings on and on!
The Horn sounds an eerie tone!
The words resonate with the ringing!
Thou dost not have the Key of Three Parts.
Thou dost not know the true nature of the Universe.
Thou doth find one third of the Three Part Key!
strings.zh: 汝尋得三段之鑰的三分之一!

strings.en: Thou hast achieved partial Avatarhood in the Virtue of %s
strings.zh: 汝已在 %s 之美德達成部分聖者之境

strings.en: Thy quest is not yet complete.
Thy thoughts are pure. Thou art granted a vision!
strings.zh: 汝之意念純淨。汝獲賜一則異象!

strings.en: Trapped at sea without thy ship, thou dost drown!
Upon which virtue dost thou meditate?

f: Fire Cannons
g: Get Chest
h: Hole up
i: Ignite torch

strings.en:
Locate position
with sextant
 Latitude: %c'%c"
Longitude: %c'%c"
strings.zh:
以六分儀
定位
 緯度: %c'%c"
經度: %c'%c"

重整隊序!
交換編號

strings.en: Thou art not able to focus thy thoughts with that Mantra!
strings.zh: 汝無法以該真言凝聚心神!

strings.en: Thou art unable to focus thy thoughts on this subject!
strings.zh: 汝無法將心神集中於此事!

strings.en: Thou dost not bear the rune of entry!  A strange force keeps you out!
strings.zh: 汝未持有入門之符文!一股奇異之力將汝拒於門外!

strings.en: Thy mind is still weary from thy last Meditation!
strings.zh: 汝之心神仍因上回冥想而疲憊!

汝走近
古老的
聖壇…

strings.en: You enter the ancient shrine and sit before the altar...
strings.zh: 汝步入古老聖壇,於祭壇前端坐…

strings.en:
You find a Fountain.
Who drinks?
strings.zh:
汝發現一座噴泉。
由誰飲用?

strings.en:
You find a Magical Ball...
Who touches?
strings.zh:
汝發現一顆魔法球…
何人觸碰?

strings.en:
You see a knob
on the telescope
marked A-P
You Select:
strings.zh:
汝見望遠鏡上
有一旋鈕
標記 A-P
汝選擇:

strings.en:
Lord British says: I have pulled thy spirit and some possessions from the void.  Be more careful in the future!

strings.zh:
不列顛王說道:吾已將汝之靈魂與些許物品自虛空中拉回。日後務必更加小心!


strings.en: the Wheel from the H.M.S. Cape
the Skull of Modain the Wizard
the sulfury remains of an ancient Sosarian Laser Gun. It turns to ash in your fingers
strings.zh: 一把古索薩利亞鐳射槍的硫磺殘骸，在汝指間化為灰燼
